title: systemd  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[252-51.0.6.2]
- sd_bus_track: use install callback instead of disconnecting on error [Orabug: 38493545]

[252-51.0.5.2]
- serialize: don't allocate 1M on the stack just like that
full_text:
[252-51.0.6.2]
- sd_bus_track: use install callback instead of disconnecting on error [Orabug: 38493545]

[252-51.0.5.2]
- serialize: don't allocate 1M on the stack just like that

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20664.html
